---
title: "primula.vital.rates"
author: "JL"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(AICcmodavg)
library(patchwork)
theme_set(theme_classic(base_size = 18)) #for ggplot

```

```{r}
primula <- read.csv(here("clean_data", "Primula_Demography_Data_CLEANED_2016thru2025.csv"))
climate <- read.csv(here("clean_data", "CGOP_climatevalues_scaled.csv"))

#scott used size.t = log(No.leaves.t * Leaf.length.t) as the size measurement
primula <- left_join(primula, climate)
primula <- primula %>% 
  group_by(tag) %>% 
  mutate(year = as.factor(year), 
         plot = as.factor(plot),
          psurvival = factor(psurvival, levels = c(0, 1)),
          psurvivalT1 = as.character(psurvivalT1),
         psurvivalT1 = factor(psurvivalT1, levels = c(0, 1)),
         pflower = factor(pflower, levels = c(0, 1)),
         pflowerT1 = factor(pflowerT1, levels = c(0, 1)),
   # size = if_else(No.leaves > 0& Leaf.length>0, log(No.leaves* Leaf.length), NA),
   #      sizeT1 = lead(size),
    trt = as.factor(trt),
    trt = fct_relevel(trt, "irrigated", "control", "drought")) 
```

```{r growth}
growth.base <- lmer(log.ros.areaT1 ~ log.ros.area + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, REML = F)
growth.t <-  lmer(log.ros.areaT1 ~ log.ros.area + trt + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, REML = F)
growth.ti <-  lmer(log.ros.areaT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, REML = F)
growth5 <-  lmer(log.ros.areaT1 ~ log.ros.area+trt+summer.mean.max.temp + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, REML = F)
growth6 <-  lmer(log.ros.areaT1 ~ log.ros.area+trt*summer.mean.max.temp + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, REML = F)
growth6.1 <-  lmer(log.ros.areaT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt+summer.mean.max.temp + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, REML = F)
growth7 <-  lmer(log.ros.areaT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt*summer.mean.max.temp + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, REML = F)


growth <- mget(ls(pattern = "^growth"))
g_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = growth,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)
#growth6
```

```{r growth figure}

pred.dat.g <- expand.grid(log.ros.area = seq(min(primula$log.ros.area, na.rm = TRUE), max(primula$log.ros.area, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1), summer.mean.max.temp = c(1.73, -1.78), trt = c("irrigated", "control", "drought"))
pred.dat.output.g <- cbind(pred.dat.g, as.data.frame(predict(growth6, newdata = pred.dat.g, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output.g)[ncol(pred.dat.output.g)] <- "log.ros.areaT1"  # Renaming the last column

(size <- primula %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.ros.area, y = log.ros.areaT1))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, shape = 1) +
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.g, aes(color = factor(summer.mean.max.temp)),linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .2)+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom")+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .4)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Summer max temp in t", values = c("cyan4","maroon"), labels = c("cool", "warm")) +
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25),  labels = function(y) round(exp(y), 0))+
  #scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
    facet_wrap(~trt)+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 6))+
  labs( x = "log(Rosette Area) in t", y = "log(Rosette Area) in t + 1", linetype = "Temp.", color = "")+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 6)))

ggsave(here("Figures", "Primula", "growth.png"), plot = size, width = 12, height =6)
```

```{r pflower}
pflow.base <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ log.ros.area + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
pflow.t <-  glmer(pflowerT1 ~ log.ros.area + trt + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
pflow.ti <-  glmer(pflowerT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
pflow.5 <-  glmer(pflowerT1 ~ log.ros.area + spring.mean.temp +(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
pflow.6 <-  glmer(pflowerT1 ~ log.ros.area + spring.mean.temp + trt+ (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
pflow.7 <-  glmer(pflowerT1 ~ log.ros.area + spring.mean.temp*trt+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
pflow.8 <-  glmer(pflowerT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt + spring.mean.temp+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
pflow.9 <-  glmer(pflowerT1 ~ log.ros.area*spring.mean.temp+trt+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")


#pflow.7.conv <-  glmer(pflowerT1 ~ log.ros.area + spring.mean.temp*trt+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial", control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 100000)))
# model 7 is fine, just needed another optimizer

modelpflower <- mget(ls(pattern = "^pflow."))
pf_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = modelpflower,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

pf_AICc <- pf_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n = 10)
pf_AICc$vitalrate <- "pflower"
AIC.save <- bind_rows(AIC.save, pf_AICc)

#pflow.ti <-  glmer(pflowerT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
summary(pflow.ti)
summary(pflow.7)
```

```{r pflower figure}
pred.dat.pf <- expand.grid(log.ros.area = seq(min(primula$log.ros.area, na.rm = TRUE), max(primula$log.ros.area, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1), trt = c("drought", "control", "irrigated"))
pred.dat.output.pf <- cbind(pred.dat.pf, as.data.frame(predict(pflow.ti, newdata = pred.dat.pf, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
 colnames(pred.dat.output.pf)[ncol(pred.dat.output.pf)] <- "pflowerT1"  # Renaming the last column

(fig.pflower <- primula %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = log.ros.area, y = as.numeric(pflowerT1) - 1))+
    geom_jitter(alpha= 0.2, shape = 1, height = 0.03)+
    geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.pf, aes(x = log.ros.area, y = pflowerT1, color = trt), linewidth = 1.15)+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#9fb764", "#e54e21", "#3088a3"))+
  labs(x = "log(Rosette Area) in t", y = "P(flowering) in t + 1", color = "")+
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom"))

 
ggsave(here("Figures", "Primula", "pflower.png"), plot = pflower, width = 6, height =6)

```

```{r number of flowers}
nf <- glmer(flow.sumT1 ~ log.ros.area + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = subset(primula, no.flowersT1>0), family = "poisson")
nf.base <-  glmer(flow.sumT1 ~ + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = subset(primula, no.flowersT1>0), family = "poisson")
nf.t <-  glmer(flow.sumT1 ~ log.ros.area+trt + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = subset(primula, no.flowersT1>0), family = "poisson")
nf.ti <-  glmer(flow.sumT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = subset(primula, no.flowersT1>0), family = "poisson")
nf.wt <-  glmer(flow.sumT1 ~ log.ros.area + winter.mean.min.temp+(1|plot) + (1|year), data= subset(primula, no.flowersT1>0), family = "poisson")
nf.wtint <-  glmer(flow.sumT1 ~ log.ros.area*winter.mean.min.temp+(1|plot) + (1|year), data=subset(primula, no.flowersT1>0), family = "poisson")
nf.wtint.trt <-  glmer(flow.sumT1 ~ log.ros.area + winter.mean.tempmin.+trt+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = subset(primula, no.flowersT1>0), family = "poisson")
nf.wt.tint1 <-  glmer(flow.sumT1 ~ log.ros.area*winter.mean.tempmin.+trt+ (1|plot) + (1|year), data = subset(primula, no.flowersT1>0), family = "poisson")
nf.wt.tint2 <-  glmer(flow.sumT1 ~ log.ros.area+winter.mean.tempmin.*trt+ (1|plot) + (1|year), data = subset(primula, no.flowersT1>0), family = "poisson")
nf.wt.tint3 <-  glmer(flow.sumT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt +winter.mean.min.temp+ (1|plot) + (1|year), data = subset(primula, no.flowersT1>0), family = "poisson")

number.flower <- mget(ls(pattern = "^nf"))
number.flower_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = number.flower,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

number.flower_AICc <- number.flower_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n = 10)
number.flower_AICc$vitalrate <- "number.flowers"
AIC.save <- bind_rows(AIC.save, number.flower_AICc)
summary(nf.wt)
```

```{r}
summary(nf) 
pred.dat <- expand.grid(log.ros.area = seq(2, max(primula$log.ros.area, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1),  winter.mean.min.temp = c(2, -2))
pred.dat.output <- cbind(pred.dat, as.data.frame(predict(nf.wt, newdata = pred.dat, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output)[ncol(pred.dat.output)] <- "flow.sumT1"  # Renaming the last column

(noflowfig <- primula %>% 
        filter(flow.sumT1>0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = log.ros.area, y = flow.sumT1))+
  geom_point(alpha= 0.2, shape = 1)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output, aes(x = log.ros.area, y = flow.sumT1, color = as.factor(winter.mean.min.temp)), linewidth = 1.15)+
   theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom")+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 6)) +
  labs(x = "log(Rosette Area) in t", y = "Number of flowers in t+1",  color = "" )+
      scale_color_manual(name = "Winter min temp in t", values = c("#90d4cc", "#bd3027"), labels = c("cool", "warm")) )

ggsave(here("Figures", "Primula", "no.flowers.png"), plot = noflowfig, width = 6, height =6)

```

```{r survival}
surv <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.t <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area + trt + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.ti <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt + (1|plot) + (1|year), data =primula, family = "binomial")
surv.11 <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area +spring.mean.temp+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.13 <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area +spring.mean.temp+ trt+(1|plot) + (1|year), primula, family = "binomial")
surv.14 <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area*spring.mean.temp+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.15 <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area*spring.mean.temp+trt+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.16 <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area+spring.mean.temp*trt+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.17 <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt+spring.mean.temp+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.11.sum <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area +summer.mean.max.temp+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.13.sum <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area +summer.mean.max.temp+ trt+(1|plot) + (1|year), primula, family = "binomial")
surv.14.sum <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area*summer.mean.max.temp+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.15.sum <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area*summer.mean.max.temp+trt+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.16.sum <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area+summer.mean.max.temp*trt+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")
surv.17.sum <-  glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area*trt+summer.mean.max.temp+(1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")

prob.survival <- mget(ls(pattern = "^surv"))
psurvival_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = prob.survival,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

psurvival_AICc <- psurvival_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n = 10)
psurvival_AICc$vitalrate <- "psurvival"
AIC.save <- bind_rows(AIC.save, psurvival_AICc)

```

```{r survival figure}
surv <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ log.ros.area + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = primula, family = "binomial")

pred.dat.s <- expand.grid(log.ros.area = seq(min(primula$log.ros.area, na.rm = TRUE), max(primula$log.ros.area, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1))
pred.dat.output.s <- cbind(pred.dat.s, as.data.frame(predict(surv, newdata = pred.dat.s, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output.s)[ncol(pred.dat.output.s)] <- "psurvivalT1"  # Renaming the last column


(s.fig <- ggplot(primula, aes(x = log.ros.area, y = as.numeric(psurvivalT1) - 1))+
  geom_jitter(alpha= 0.2, shape = 1, height = .02)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.s, aes(x = log.ros.area, y = psurvivalT1), linewidth = 1.15)+
   # scale_color_manual(values = c("#323697", "#f2623f"))+
   #scale_linetype_manual(values = c("twodash", "solid"), labels = c("cool", "warm"))+
      theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1),
        text = element_text(size = 20))+ 
      labs(y = "P(survival) in t+1", x = "log(Rosette Area) in t"))

ggsave(here("Figures", "Primula", "survival.png"), plot = s.fig, width = 6, height =6)
```

```{r}
pclonal <- glmer(pclonalT1 ~ log.ros.area + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = subset(primula, !is.na(no.neighbors)&!is.na(pclonalT1)), family = "binomial")
leaf <- primula %>% 
  filter(no.smleaf>0,
         !is.na(no.neighbors),
         no.smleaf<15)
no.clones <- glmer(no.smleaf ~ log.ros.area + (1|plot) + (1|year), data = leaf, family = "poisson")
```
